facts: Thirty percent of all Dalmatians are deaf in one or both ears. Because bulldogs have extremely short muzzles, many spend their lives fighting suffocation. Because Chihuahuas have such small skulls, the flow of spinal fluid can be restricted, causing hydrocephalus, a swelling of the brain.
The Labrador Retriever is the #1 favorite breed in the U.S., Canada, and the U.K.
Dogs who have been spayed or neutered live longer than intact dogs.
A Great Dane named "Just Nuisance" is the only dog to have officially enlisted in the Royal Navy.
A dog's sense of smell is so strong that they can detect cancer in humans.
